jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Emeritus
jsonLd.description:
Emeritus, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Emeritus:
Emeritus is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emeritus!
